design_plan: rng=42; AIDA_pass=true; hero_max_width=1120; bento_density=grid-auto-flow:dense; labels_checked=true; button_contrast=AA;
headline: Super vs Grok — personal AI agents for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Grok. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Grok

summary: A fair, evidence‑based comparison of Super and Grok for people evaluating personal AI agents. Grok excels at real‑time context, social data, and strong agentic benchmarks. Super is built for durable computer‑use workflows, with a reusable computer‑use cache that makes repeated execution faster and cheaper over time.
